name: U.S. Bank Cash+™ Visa Signature® Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $200 cash bonus after spending $1,000 in eligible purchases within the first 90 days of account opening.

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on the first $2,000 in combined eligible purchases each quarter in two categories you choose; categories must be selected and activated.

earning_rates.category: Prepaid travel through U.S. Bank Travel Center
earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on eligible air, hotel and car reservations booked directly in the U.S. Bank Travel Center.
2% cash back on one everyday category you choose, such as grocery stores/grocery delivery, restaurants, or gas stations/EV charging.
1% cash back on all other eligible purchases.

other_benefits.name: Cell phone protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $600 reimbursement for stolen/damaged cell phone when paying monthly bill with card

other_benefits.name: Extended Pay Plan
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 12 months with U.S. Bank ExtendPay

sources.notes: Official U.S. Bank Cash+ page; verified 2026-06-13.
Official U.S. Bank Cash+ rewards program rules.

notes: Choose and activate two 5% Cash+ categories quarterly; 5% cash back is capped on combined eligible purchases each quarter. Also choose one 2% everyday category.

selectable_rewards.cap: 5% cash back applies to the first $2,000 in combined eligible purchases each quarter across the two chosen 5% categories.
two_percent_categories: Gas stations and EV charging stations
